feat.name: Instrument of Slaughter
feat.text: Your blessed armament thirsts for the blood of your foes. Whenever you critically hit an enemy with a Strike that has the extra damage from your champion's reaction, the target also takes persistent bleed damage equal to two of the weapon's damage dice.

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.

feat.prerequisite: champion’s reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)
